description: Multiple repeated patterns in refresh_loop.cr: (1) cancel_ch.send(nil) rescue nil appears 4 times; (2) begin channel.send(X) rescue Channel::ClosedError end appears 3 times (lines 206-208, 222-224, 251-253); (3) rescue CancelError / rescue ex : Exception / ensure blocks repeat in run_initial_refresh, run_timed_refresh, fetch_single_feed_in_background, and start; (4) the debug? logging guard is repeated ~10 times. Introduce helper methods like safe_channel_send(channel, value) and safe_cancel(cancel_ch) to eliminate duplication.
title: DRY up repeated cancel/exception handling patterns
